content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "LCM Problem". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1389/A
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T test cases follow. The first line of each test case contains two integers a and b.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the least common multiple (LCM) of a and b.

hidden.label: tricky case
hidden.expectedOutput: Error: LCM is not defined for zero

solution.approach: Use the formula lcm(a, b) = |a*b| / gcd(a, b) to calculate the LCM.
